message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam lifelinestrategy solid
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFCC
skinparam noteBorderColor #CCCC99
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6E6
skinparam participantBorderColor #CCCCCC
skinparam participantPadding 5
skinparam boxPadding 10
skinparam boxBackgroundColor #F0F0F0
skinparam boxBorderColor #CCCCCC

box "BL1 common code" #LightGrey
    participant bl1_main
    participant bl_common
end box

box "arm platform code" #LightBlue
    participant fvp_bl1_setup
    participant arm_bl1_setup
    participant arm_io_storage
end box

box "platform common code" #LightGrey
    participant plat_bl1_common
    participant fconf
end box

bl1_main -> fvp_bl1_setup: bl1_platform_setup()
activate fvp_bl1_setup
fvp_bl1_setup -> arm_bl1_setup: arm_bl1_platform_setup()
activate arm_bl1_setup
arm_bl1_setup -> arm_io_storage: plat_arm_io_setup()
activate arm_io_storage
note right of arm_io_storage: register and setup fip
arm_bl1_setup -> fconf: fconf_load_config()
activate fconf
note right of fconf: create and populate an\nimage_desc_t for FW_CONFIG
fconf --> bl_common: load_auth_image(FW_CONFIG_ID, &image_info)
activate bl_common
note left of bl_common: load and auth image from fip\nwith info from plat_io_policy
bl_common -> fconf: FCONF_GET_PROPERTY(arm, arm_io_policies, tb_fw_cfg)
note right of fconf: use statically defined policies in bl1
fconf --> bl_common: image_info
note right of fconf: get tb_fw_config_dtb from image_info
bl_common -> plat_bl1_common: bl1_plat_get_image_desc(BL2_IMAGE_ID)
activate plat_bl1_common
plat_bl1_common --> bl_common: BL2_IMAGE_DESC
note right of plat_bl1_common: set ep_info.args.arg0 of BL2_IMAGE_DESC\nto FW_CONFIG base address
deactivate plat_bl1_common
deactivate fconf
deactivate arm_io_storage
deactivate arm_bl1_setup
deactivate fvp_bl1_setup
deactivate bl_common

== load & auth, prepare and jump to BL2 ==

@enduml
```
